headline: Former McDonald's Owner-Operator Brings Paris Baguette to Thousand Oaks as Part of Multi-Unit West LA Expansion
summary: Paris Baguette, the bakery café concept with more than 4,000 units worldwide, is growing quickly in North America. With more than 300 bakery cafés open across the region and more in development, they are continuing to build a strong presence. Paris Baguette is continuing that momentum with a new location in the Southern California market.
